description_long: This serving tray features an oval shape with a shallow, transparent or semi-translucent rimmed edge, containing a neatly arranged set of round, flat-topped pieces. Each piece is marked with a red Chinese character on its top surface, suggesting they are game pieces, possibly for Chinese chess (Xiangqi). The tray itself appears to be made of a clear or frosted plastic or acrylic, allowing the pieces inside to be visible from the sides. The base of the tray is dark and flat, providing a stable support for the pieces. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on organization and display of the game pieces. The tray is compact and portable, suitable for tabletop use in urban recreational or communal settings.
description: An oval, clear tray holding neatly arranged round game pieces with red Chinese characters, set on a dark base. The tray is shallow, transparent, and designed for organized display and transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval tray with all game pieces visible and their red markings clearly displayed.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the tray and the arrangement of the pieces from a corner perspective.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the full set of pieces from the opposite side, with the transparent rim and dark base visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite end, emphasizing the tray's shallow profile and the alignment of the pieces.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is a continuous, shallow, and slightly raised edge made of clear or frosted plastic, approximately 1 cm high and 2-3 mm thick, with a smooth, rounded profile and no decorative features.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Each round piece features a single red Chinese character on its top surface, forming a uniform, calligraphic motif. No other decorative patterns are present on the tray or rim.
attribute_reflective_properties: The tray surface is smooth and semi-glossy, with mild reflections and soft highlights, especially on the rim. The game pieces have a matte finish with minimal reflectivity.
